_doc: === CONTENTION: Two situations that make conflicting claims ===
_contention_type: REQUIRED. One of: DirectContradiction (A says X, B says not-X), NumericalDisagreement (different numbers), TemporalDisagreement (different timelines), AttributionDisagreement (different attribution), OmissionBias (one source omits key info).
description: Source A places the meeting at 22:30, Source B claims 23:00
_resolved: Whether this contention has been adjudicated.
_resolution: OPTIONAL. Analyst notes on how the contention was resolved.
